response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack engineer with broad polyglot background (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) and some Java/C++ exposure, but lacks the specific depth required for this role. There is no demonstrated experience with Kotlin, Spring ecosystem, IDE internals, or JVM tooling — the core requirements. Recent work (re:cinq, Optilyz, RIDE) is predominantly TypeScript/Node.js/AWS, far from enterprise JVM tooling. The brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments on LabWindows/CVI is the only IDE-adjacent experience but is over a decade old and not JVM-related.
strengths: Long track record on complex, large-scale systems and developer tooling
Some IDE-adjacent experience (LabWindows/CVI at National Instruments)
Strong software craftsmanship background — TDD, testing, workshops, OSS contributions
concerns: Limited recent Java work; no Kotlin experience listed
Core JVM and IDE-internals expertise not evidenced in recent roles

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering and tooling background
